finding: The reconciled terminal durability state was covered by a deterministic local test but was not enforced by a repository workflow. A path-scoped CI gate converts that test from advisory evidence into a merge-time regression barrier.
design_implication: Any change to the peer execution runtime, filesystem adapter, terminal journal, relevant tests, or the workflow itself now triggers syntax checks and the durability contract test under Node.js 22.
uncertainty: GitHub Actions has not yet reported a run for the new workflow commit.
The test remains process-local and does not simulate abrupt operating-system process termination.
falsification_route: A workflow syntax rejection falsifies deployability of the gate.
A failing Node test falsifies the durability contract on a clean runner.
A runtime or journal change that does not trigger this workflow falsifies path coverage.
privacy_boundary: Public repository source and test metadata only; no private chats, credentials, health data, or personal identifiers included.
